The '''slaatik hagworm''' was an enormous [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] predatory myriapod which lived in the [[Lianorm Swamp/Legends|Lianorm Swamp]], on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It was protected by a hard, [[Chitin/Legends|chitinous]] [[exoskeleton]], and was vulnerable primarily on its underside. It also had pincers on its tail, and had [[Color/Legends|green]] and white skin tones.

The slaatik hagworm attacked its prey by unleashing a barrage of [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] gas from glands about its mandibles and by throwing its massive bulk onto its prey in an attempt to crush it.

Hagworms could also share a symbiotic relationship with native [[kreetle]]s.

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] defeated a slaatik hagworm in the swamps on their way to [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].

==Behind the scenes==
Slaatik hagworms appear in the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]''.
